MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-14-2007 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2007 Off Calendar

MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Defendant's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar/fee paid. Proceedings reported by: Laura E. Martinez, CSR# 11332. (212)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Answers By Plaintiff To Defendant'S Form Interrogatories, Set One And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-12-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Maureen Green's motion to compel further responses to form interrogatories is granted.

2.1 Through 2.8, 12.1, 12.2 and 50.2
The objections are overruled and stricken. plaintiff is ordered to serve verified supplemental responses within 15 days of notice of this order

12.3 Through 12.6
The objections are overruled and stricken. The answers are otherwise sufficient.

The Court finds that plaintiff asserted unmeritorious objections. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $690 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Answers
Off Calendar Dec-11-2006 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-04-2006 Set For Trial On Apr-09-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Mar-22-07 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 505
